rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding only valid AGREE assignments in implementation annexes when the left-hand side is a valid output port
Delete invalid guarantees or assumptions that reference subcomponent ports or AADL properties not exposed as AGREE variables
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only visible identifiers in the current annex scope for repairs
Do not introduce new AADL package references or qualified identifiers without matching `with` clauses
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE assignments must be placed in implementation annexes when the left-hand side is an output port
AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not move implementation-level bindings to component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
